title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Skills
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Anthropic employees use Claude Skills in practice, identifying five lessons including understanding skill categories, using power components, focusing on verifiers, writing gotchas, and tuning triggers. He argues that treating Skills as mere markdown files is a flawed mental model and that they should be tuned systematically to compound value over time.
writeup: Austin Marchese examines how Anthropic employees apply Claude Skills in day-to-day work and distills the patterns into five lessons: understanding skill categories, using power components, focusing on verifiers, writing gotchas, and tuning triggers. The central argument is that viewing Skills as plain markdown files is a flawed mental model, and that systematic tuning lets their value compound over time. The takeaways center on treating Skills as components to be engineered and refined rather than static documents.
